data.title: SWIFT at Davos: Interoperable Tokenized Assets Can Accelerate Global Trade and Unlock Liquidity
data.description: At the World Economic Forum in Davos, global payments network SWIFT said that interoperable tokenized assets could significantly improve global trade efficiency, unlock new liquidity, and strengthen the connection between traditional finance and digital finance.SWIFT emphasized that enabling interoperability across tokenized asset systems would allow financial institutions to settle transactions faster, reduce friction in cross-border payments, and integrate blockchain-based assets into existing financial infrastructure.

data.title: Agent of "1011 Insider Whale": Windemute's views have been misinterpreted; institutional participation is driving the market from speculation to allocation.
data.description: Garrett Jin, an agent for "1011 Insider Whale," published an article on the X platform stating that Wintermute's viewpoint has been interpreted as "the traditional bull market cycle for cryptocurrencies has ended." This viewpoint is very commercial. Institutions have not ended the bull market, but rather changed it. As institutional asset management scale increases, asset prices tend to rise, while volatility decreases. BTC and ETH are undergoing a transition from a speculative mechanism to an allocation mechanism. Wintermute's actual view is that with the deepening of institutional participation, top crypto assets, led by BTC and ETH, are evolving from speculative tools into allocable assets. The current market changes are not the end of the bull market, but rather a shift from a "retail-driven, high-volatility, meme-dominated" phase to a "allocation-driven, institutionally positioned, institutional-level volatility" mechanism.

data.title: Bitget TradFi's daily trading volume surpasses $4 billion, setting a new record.
data.description: Bitget TradFi's daily trading volume continues to grow, exceeding $4 billion yesterday, setting a new record after reaching $2 billion on January 8th. The top 5 assets by trading volume are: XAUUSD (gold), US30 (Dow Jones Industrial Average), XAGUSD (silver), NAS100 (Nasdaq 100 Index), and EURUSD (euro). data.title: Challenges in Implementing Wallet Login in Crypto Platforms
data.description: DeFiLlama founder 0xngmi recently highlighted challenges in the implementation of 'Log in with Wallet' in the crypto industry. According to Odaily, while this method is frequently discussed, many platforms face practical obstacles. A significant issue is that users often forget the wallet address they used for registration. Additionally, the wallet login method makes it difficult to send timely critical notifications, such as API quota usage alerts, to users. Introducing email as a supplementary step can partially address these issues but undermines the original purpose of wallet login and increases user friction. Although wallet login remains valuable in applications requiring high security, such applications represent only a small portion of the overall market.

data.title: DeFiLlama founder: The actual implementation of wallet login methods on most crypto platforms faces far greater friction than expected.
data.description: DeFiLlama founder 0xngmi stated in an article on the X platform that although "login with wallet" is frequently discussed in the crypto industry, most crypto platforms face many practical obstacles in actual implementation. One of the biggest problems is that users often forget the wallet address they used to register. In addition, it is difficult to send key notifications (such as API quota usage reminders) to users in a timely manner under the wallet login mode. While introducing email as a supplementary step can partially solve the problem, it weakens the original intention of wallet login and increases friction in use. Although wallet login still has value in application scenarios with high security requirements, such applications only account for a small part of the overall market.

data.title: The founder of GMGN missed out on nearly $450,000 in profits after failing to take profits at the peak of his "memes" purchase.
data.description: GMGN founder Haze invested $869.50 in the meme coin "memes" during its initial public offering (IPO) phase when its market capitalization was $45,000. His unrealized profit initially reached $520,000. However, possibly influenced by a deleted tweet from He Yi, the market experienced a panic sell-off of the meme coin. Haze sold all his holdings during this period, at an average price of $3.83 million, realizing a profit of $72,900. Notably, the token subsequently rebounded, and as of press time, its market capitalization was $12.35 million. Odaily reminds users that the price of meme coins is highly volatile, and investors should participate with caution.

data.title: Ethereum Co-Founder Predicts Decentralized Social Media Growth by 2026
data.description: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has predicted a revival of decentralized social media platforms by 2026. According to NS3.AI, Buterin emphasized the necessity for enhanced tools to foster a more robust society. He expressed concerns over existing crypto social projects, criticizing their dependence on speculative tokens that lead to financial bubbles and detract from content quality. Despite these issues, Buterin remains hopeful about the future development and influence of decentralized communication technologies.

data.title: How Crypto Usage Is Changing and Why Payment Cards Are Driving It
data.description:
Crypto-native payment cards are entering a new phase of adoption, with usage data pointing to a clear inflection point. Since December 2024, daily transactions have surged 22x, signaling a shift away from manual offramping and toward routine, real-world spending directly from on-chain balances.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/how-crypto-usage-is-changing-and-why-payment-cards-are-driving-it/

data.title: AI Platform Aims to Enhance Public Understanding of Air Quality
data.description:
A young developer known as 'No Sleep World Champion' has launched an AI-driven platform, airo2.xyz, to visualize air quality data, according to ChainCatcher. The platform uses publicly available air quality information to present real-time conditions and trends across various locations through an intuitive interface, aiming to explore new paths for publicizing air information and promoting environmental awareness.

The platform consolidates air quality data from various sources and presents it visually, offering insights into local air conditions. It also provides lifestyle suggestions, such as whether outdoor activities or commuting are advisable, thereby lowering the barriers for the public to understand air quality indicators.

Following its launch, the platform sparked discussions within the community, with several users from technical backgrounds contributing to the optimization of page structure, data presentation, and indicator explanations. This collaborative effort has made the display of air information more intuitive, stable, and readable. The initiative is seen as a practical application of AI technology in enhancing public environmental awareness and advocating for green living.

data.title: Gate will list on ETHGas (GWEI).
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate will launch ETHGas (GWEI) spot trading at 22:00 (UTC+8) on January 21st, and will debut ETHGas (GWEI) perpetual contract live trading (USDT settlement) at 22:10 (UTC+8) on January 21st, supporting leverage of 1-20x. Gate Perp DEX will also be launched simultaneously. Gate will add unified account lending and isolated margin trading pairs for ETHGas (GWEI) at 22:10 (UTC+8) on January 21st, and simultaneously launch GWEI savings accounts, flexible collateralized lending, and fixed-term collateralized lending features. GWEI trading bots and copy trading will be available within one hour of the perpetual contract launch. GWEI instant swap and dollar-cost averaging features will be launched gradually one hour after spot trading begins.

data.title: Bank Teller Charged with Forgery and Theft of Customer Funds
data.description: A veteran teller at Fifth Third Bank faces charges for allegedly forging customer signatures and stealing $8,450 from accounts between September and October 2025. According to NS3.AI, surveillance footage and the teller's admission have implicated her in the unauthorized withdrawals. Authorities emphasize the necessity for enhanced internal controls to prevent similar financial misconduct.
